requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Evidence and Harsh-Site Installation Review
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全证据及严苛场站安装审查
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全證據及嚴苛場站安裝審查

summary.en: Papua New Guinea EV charger projects should prepare IEC 61851-1 safety evidence for conductive EV supply equipment and IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations. Because many deployments may be at mines, LNG facilities, ports, islands, highlands, or off-grid sites, safety review should include protective earthing, RCD or RDC-DD strategy, isolation monitoring, emergency stop, enclosure IP rating, corrosion resistance, surge protection, ventilation, thermal derating, and installation competency.
summary.zh: 巴布亚新几内亚电动汽车充电桩项目应准备IEC 61851-1传导式电动汽车供电设备安全证据，直流站还应准备IEC 61851-23证据。由于许多部署可能位于矿山、LNG设施、港口、岛屿、高地或离网站点，安全审查应包括保护接地、RCD或RDC-DD策略、绝缘监测、急停、外壳IP等级、耐腐蚀、浪涌保护、通风、热降额和安装能力。
summary.zht: 巴布亞紐幾內亞電動汽車充電樁項目應準備IEC 61851-1傳導式電動汽車供電設備安全證據，直流站還應準備IEC 61851-23證據。由於許多部署可能位於礦山、LNG設施、港口、島嶼、高地或離網站點，安全審查應包括保護接地、RCD或RDC-DD策略、絕緣監測、急停、外殼IP等級、耐腐蝕、浪湧保護、通風、熱降額和安裝能力。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures
Project electrical safety and installation specifications

summary.en: China's common baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system requirements. It is useful for design review, but it includes China-specific connector, pilot, and communication assumptions and does not directly replace IEC 61851 test reports or project safety evidence for Papua New Guinea installations.
summary.zh: 中国常用基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求。该标准可用于设计审查，但包含中国特有接口、导引和通信假设，不能直接替代巴布亚新几内亚安装所需的IEC 61851测试报告或项目安全证据。
summary.zht: 中國常用基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求。該標準可用於設計審查，但包含中國特有接口、導引和通訊假設，不能直接替代巴布亞紐幾內亞安裝所需的IEC 61851測試報告或項目安全證據。

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851 clause matrix, accredited safety reports where required, enclosure and impact certificates, earthing and residual-current protection design, and site installation instructions. For remote or industrial sites, add microgrid fault-level checks, surge and lightning protection, dust and corrosion review, and serviceability plans.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851逐条矩阵、按需提供认可安全报告、外壳及冲击证书、接地和剩余电流保护设计，以及现场安装说明。对于偏远或工业场站，还应增加微电网故障电流水平核查、浪涌及防雷保护、粉尘和腐蚀审查，以及维护可达性计划。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851逐條矩陣、按需提供認可安全報告、外殼及衝擊證書、接地和剩餘電流保護設計，以及現場安裝說明。對於偏遠或工業場站，還應增加微電網故障電流水平核查、浪湧及防雷保護、粉塵和腐蝕審查，以及維護可達性計劃。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory where IEC safety evidence is required by the importer, site owner, utility, insurer, tender, or electrical installer
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 acceptance evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design input only. Papua New Guinea projects should request IEC 61851 safety evidence and a site-specific installation review, especially for mining, LNG, microgrid, coastal, and highland deployments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 18487.1-2023只能作为设计输入。巴布亚新几内亚项目应要求IEC 61851安全证据和场站特定安装审查，尤其是矿业、LNG、微电网、沿海和高地部署。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 18487.1-2023只能作為設計輸入。巴布亞紐幾內亞項目應要求IEC 61851安全證據和場站特定安裝審查，尤其是礦業、LNG、微電網、沿海和高地部署。
